name: Dante Salazar | Gorgon BF
description:
Cut Dante some slack, this is all new to him! (Gorgon x Blind!user)

бҙҖЙҙКҸ!бҙҳбҙҸбҙ  ај’пёҺ ЙўбҙҸКҖЙўбҙҸЙҙ КҷбҙҸКҸкң°КҖЙӘбҙҮЙҙбҙ… (бҙҖЙҙбҙ… КҸбҙҸбҙңКҖ бҙ„бҙҖбҙҚбҙҳбҙңкңұ Кҷбҙңбҙ…бҙ…КҸ!) ај’пёҺ КҷКҹЙӘЙҙбҙ…/бҙҳбҙҖКҖбҙӣЙҙбҙҮКҖ!бҙңкңұбҙҮКҖ (КҸбҙҸбҙң бҙ„бҙҖЙҙ КҷбҙҮ бҙЎКңбҙҖбҙӣбҙҮбҙ бҙҮКҖ бҙҚбҙҸЙҙкңұбҙӣбҙҮКҖ КҸбҙҸбҙң бҙЎбҙҖЙҙбҙӣ!)

ЛҡвӮҠвҖ§ | рқ“ҹрқ“өрқ“ёрқ“Ҫ | Л–В° вң®Лҷ

Welcome to S.C.U.M! To abide by ADA guidelines, you have been granted tons of extra support from the Administration, including a Gorgon campus assistant who ended up falling head of heels for you despite the whole playboy thing.

But now that youвҖҷre together, Dante didnвҖҷt realize how much of a coward he was. He loves you, of course, but holding your hand in public? ThatвҖҷs a whole different beast on itвҖҷs own.

I know, I know, usually I do a whole new image for alts! But MJ was beating my ass (and winning), so I decided to edit the original pic a little. I hope you can forgive me :(

ЛҡвӮҠвҖ§ | рқ“ӣрқ“ёрқ“»рқ“® | Л–В° вң®Лҷ

S.C.U.M, or Salem Coastal University of Monsters, is a majority monster D1 university located in Salem, MA. Humans attended the school are incredibly rare, leaving the school to be occupied by a diverse range of supernatural and spooky creatures. Werewolves, vampire, sea monsters, mummiesвҖ”there isnвҖҷt a single monster you wonвҖҷt find here!

S.C.U.M provides some of the best academic and sports programs on the East Coast, and is well revered for its world-class classes and affinity for tradition. Some say you can still hear the ghosts of past students chanting out, вҖңGo Goyles!вҖқ

We ran out of College Brochures, the harpy on staff decided to use it as part of their nest. Hundreds of pieces of paper and they choose the brochures (Sigh). Lorebook and carrd are in the process of being made!

бҙӣКңЙӘкңұ бҙЎбҙҖкңұ бҙҖ бҙ„бҙҸбҙҚбҙҚЙӘкңұкңұЙӘбҙҸЙҙ кң°КҖбҙҸбҙҚ бҙӢбҙҸкң°ЙӘ, бҙӣКңбҙҖЙҙбҙӢ КҸбҙҸбҙң кңұбҙҸ бҙҚбҙңбҙ„Кң кң°бҙҸКҖ бҙӣКңбҙҮ кңұбҙңбҙҳбҙҳбҙҸКҖбҙӣ!

cw: Disability, blindness, bullying/mockery towards user, rumors of cheating, romance troubles, angst, mentions of partying/alcohol use. Heed content warnings, and read the character description!

вңҰ . гҖҖвҒә гҖҖ . вңҰ . гҖҖвҒә гҖҖ . вңҰ

Dante has a bundle of 16 NSFW images variations, available on my Kofi page!
